channel.title: Ansible on kencho51
channel.description: Recent content in Ansible on kencho51

item.title: Learn, todo and done 21-25/6/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Design Pattern, Doc, Pattern Libraries Postman for testing API, YouTube Essential Scrum, Chapter [5, 7, 17, 18, 19] Terraform Ansible IBMCloud TechWorld What is IaCode DevOps Crash Course, youtube Todo - Project Automatically setup Macbook for dev using Ansible geerlingguy wilsonnar Done - Project Todo - Github Finish Changes to test infrastructure #643 Dockerize the Codeception Study the unit test and functional test Done - Github All giga zoom: demo #503 and #521 Revisited Add delete button in admin page #503 and Create dropdown box and retrieve citation detail #521 Sprint0 retrospective Sprint 1 Started Sprint1 task #682, project page AOB Replied Chris H on the instruction and guidelines on MOST application.

item.title: Learn, todo and done 15-18/6/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Design Pattern, Doc, Pattern Libraries Postman for testing API, YouTube Essential Scrum, Chapter [5, 7, 17, 18, 19] Terraform Ansible IBMCloud TechWorld What is IaCode DevOps Crash Course, youtube Todo - Project Automatically setup Macbook for dev using Ansible geerlingguy wilsonnar Done - Project Todo - Github Done - Github Get fuw-cicd-#546 running in my computer, review doc at here Arrtibute ID cannot be blank is an expected error, because gigadb may not have that attribute names from fuwdb Finish Changes to test infrastructure #643 Refractored the acceptance test AOB Follow up Chinse HGR, data list MOST record 国家人类遗传资源管理 Met with Yuchong on 18/6/2021: To play safe, better to apply for a new registration ID for every Chinese HGR datasets To complete the application, authors need to follow this guideline and fill in the form.

item.title: Learn, todo and done 7-11/6/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Design Pattern, Doc, Pattern Libraries Postman for testing API, YouTube Essential Scrum, Chapter [5, 7, 17, 18, 19] Terraform Ansible IBMCloud TechWorld What is IaCode DevOps Crash Course, youtube Todo - Project repo, doc Done - Project Todo - Github Done - Github Get fuw-cicd-#546 running in my computer, review doc at here Fixed When I clicked View Dataset after Move files to public ftp, the page still did not contain any uploaded data Finish Changes to test infrastructure #643 Finished acceptance test AOB Follow up Chinse HGR, data list Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 31/5-4/6/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Design Pattern, Doc, Pattern Libraries Postman for testing API, YouTube Essential Scrum, Chapter [5, 7, 17, 18, 19] Terraform Ansible IBMCloud TechWorld What is IaCode DevOps Crash Course, youtube Todo - Project repo, doc Done - Project Todo - Github Done - Github Get fuw-cicd-#546 running in my computer, review doc at here Finished the workflow video, but when I clicked View Dataset after Move files to public ftp, the page still did not contain any uploaded data Finish Changes to test infrastructure #643 Finished unit test, functional test AOB Finished the draft and send email to BGI legal dept, doc Waiting Chris reply Found out that psql port 5432 should have been opened by request purposely #636 Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 24-28/5/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Design Pattern, Doc, Pattern Libraries Postman for testing API, YouTube Essential Scrum, Chapter [5, 7, 17, 18, 19] Terraform Ansible IBMCloud TechWorld What is IaCode DevOps Crash Course, youtube Todo - Project repo, doc Time to pick up taverna again, it could produce excel with all the columns except the publon review link DOI column Peter will help on the getPublonReviewLinkDoi Done - Project Todo - Github Done - Github Get fuw-cicd-#546 running in my computer, review doc at here Ran unit test, functional test, acceptance test and coverage test AOB Drafted email to BGI legal dept, doc Finished 2 rounds of TPM interviews Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 17-2/5/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Design Pattern, Doc, Pattern Libraries Postman for testing API, YouTube Essential Scrum, Chapter [5, 7, 17, 18, 19] Terraform Ansible IBMCloud TechWorld What is IaCode DevOps Crash Course, youtube Todo - Project repo, requirement doc, progress Time to pick up taverna again, it could produce excel with all the columns except the publon review link DOI column Done - Project Todo - Github Done - Github Follow up Add-citation-box-#521 Bring the dropdown item to the front and pass the behat test Update patterned library Review fuw-cicd-#546, review doc at here Exception 'yii\db\Exception' with message 'SQLSTATE[08006] [7] could not translate host name "dockerhost" to address: Name or service not known' AOB Follow up NAS issues Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 10-14/5/21

item.title: Learn, todo and done 3-7/5/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Design Pattern, Doc, Pattern Libraries Postman for testing API, YouTube Essential Scrum, Chapter [5, 7, 17, 18, 19] Terraform Ansible IBMCloud DevOps Crash Course, youtube Todo - Project repo, doc Local Taverna Study DataCite MDS API Guide Get DOI for publon review link Done - Project Found actionMint in /protected/controller/AdminDatasetController.
